arts.ttl: Sir Alex Ferguson 'stance' on Man United manager 'target' amid Erik ten Hag scrutiny revealed
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag has two crucial games ahead of him in the Europa League and Premier League against FC Porto and Aston Villa respectively

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag did what Manchester United fans wanted - that's why they won't turn on him now
arts.sum: Old Trafford stayed behind the team on Sunday as Man Utd were beaten 3-0 by Tottenham and while most fans now accept Erik ten Hag's days might be numbered, there is a reason they retain respect for him.

arts.ttl: Man Utd news: Erik ten Hag reprieve as legend points finger at star players
arts.sum: Dwight Yorke is blaming Manchester United's underperforming players for their dire start to the season but heat remains on Erik ten Hag ahead of decisive five days

arts.ttl: 'I'm a Man Utd legend - their demise is so bad I refuse to cover their matches'
arts.sum: Manchester United are struggling once again under Erik ten Hag's management and Patrice Evra finds it difficult to work as a pundit on their matches because it upsets him so much

arts.ttl: Sir Alex Ferguson 'has chosen Erik ten Hag's replacement at Manchester United': Bombshell report in Italy claims legendary manager has had his say as pressure mounts on under-fire boss
arts.sum: A bombshell report in Italy claims a potential replacement for embattled Manchester United boss Erik ten Hag has the backing of none other than Sir Alex Ferguson.

arts.ttl: Scott McTominay reveals key difference between Man Utd and Napoli after summer switch
arts.sum: Scott McTominay completed a £27.5million move from Manchester United to Napoli over the summer and he has identified the key difference between playing in England and Italy

arts.ttl: Graham Potter discusses Man Utd links amid renewed Erik ten Hag uncertainty
arts.sum: Graham Potter has admitted being involved in "conversations" after being rumoured to be a potential candidate to replace Erik ten Hag at Manchester United since the summer. He was rumoured to be one of the many candidates United spoke to when deciding where to go with Ten Hag's future, although Potter has now claimed that a lot of speculation is "untrue".

arts.ttl: Man Utd confirm outcome of Bruno Fernandes red card appeal
arts.sum: The Football Association have overturned the three-match ban handed out to Manchester United midfielder Bruno Fernandes after accepting the Red Devils' appeal of wrongful dismissal. "Bruno Fernandes will be available for Manchester United's next three games following a successful claim of wrongful dismissal," a club statement read.

arts.ttl: Man Utd recruitment under 'increasing scrutiny' from new hierarchy
arts.sum: Since the end of the summer transfer window, sporting director Dan Ashworth is described as performing a "deep dive" into how the club works and has already noticed "shortcomings in certain areas". Manchester United’s recruitment department is reported to be under "increasing scrutiny" as the club's new sporting hierarchy gets deeper into the job at hand.

arts.ttl: Rio Ferdinand's six-word Man Utd response speaks volumes amid Erik ten Hag struggles
arts.sum: Rio Ferdinand was quick to try and move on from discussion about Manchester United's poor form while working as a pundit on TNT Sports' coverage of Manchester City's win over Slovan Bratislava
